name: Lady's Thigh Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onions and sauté them with two-thirds of the minced meat and one tablespoon margarine until softened.
2. Cook the rice in plenty of water until tender, then drain.
3. Remove the meat from the heat and add the remaining minced meat, cooked rice, chopped parsley, salt, black pepper, and 3 eggs to the mixture. Knead well to combine.
4. Form the mixture into egg-sized pieces and shape them into oval forms.
5. Place half of the flour on a tray. Spread the meatballs on the tray and sprinkle the remaining flour over them.
6. Beat the 2 eggs in a bowl.
7. Coat the meatballs with beaten eggs for about 20 minutes before serving.
8. Heat three-fourths of a cup olive oil in a pan.
9. Fry the meatballs in the hot oil until golden brown.
10. Remove the meatballs from the pan using a perforated spoon, draining excess oil well.
11. Serve on a plate.
